chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6255 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.25928/2024 2. For hearing of CMA No.1021/2024 3. For orders as to maintainability of petition 24.12.2024 Mr. Muhammad Irfan Siddiqui, advocate for the petitioner MR. Sameer Tayebaly, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General This petition is filed essentially seeking relief against the Sindh Tenpin Bowling Association Karachi. Learned counsel for respondent placed on record judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of Pakistan Olympic Association reported as 2019 SCMR 221 and stated that in view thereof the present petition is prima facie misconceived. Learned counsel for the petitioner when confronted made no effort to rebut the same. In mutatis mutandis application of the binding edict referred to above, this petition is found to be misconceived, hence, the same is dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
